name: transaction-second-mortgage
rationale: Second mortgage scenario: existing first mortgage ($380k with Scotia) + new second mortgage request ($120k). Combined LTV ($500k against $720k property) = 69%. F1.MP='2nd mortgage' + F1.TT='2nd Mortgage'. Tests R4-RESIDUAL-1 combined-LTV computation (standalone LTV of new mortgage is 17%; combined is 69%) and second-mortgage canonical-map shape.
notes: Single-event sequence. Tests second-mortgage-specific math + canonical_map structure.
